seq.description: Recent repo stream event sequence number. May be delayed from actual stream processing (eg, persisted cursor not in-memory cursor).

accountCount.description: Number of accounts on the server which are associated with the upstream host. Note that the upstream may actually have more accounts.

hostname.description: Hostname of the host (eg, PDS or relay) being queried.

main.description: Returns information about a specified upstream host, as consumed by the server. Implemented by relays.
